why_section.heading: Why EliteX Trade?
why_section.body:
EliteX Trade is a cutting-edge trading solution designed to simplify wealth growth. By focusing on consistent and steady performance, it allows you to benefit from the same advanced technology used by professionals—all without requiring any trading expertise.

Unlike many other systems, EliteX Trade prioritizes safety and reliability, offering a hands-free experience that lets you focus on what matters most while your investments work for you.

future_sections.heading: One EliteX Trade,
future_sections.body: Take your trading to the next level with EliteX Trade. Our state-of-the-art technology empowers you to achieve steady, consistent results, all with a fully automated solution that works for you. Whether you're an experienced trader or just starting, EliteX Trade simplifies the complexities of the market, allowing you to focus on what truly matters while it handles the rest.

future_sections.heading: The gold standard
future_sections.body: Discover why EliteX Trade is trusted by traders worldwide. Designed to deliver precision and consistent performance, this automated trading bot adapts to various market conditions and asset classes. It's the ultimate tool for achieving reliable returns without the need for constant monitoring, freeing you to enjoy the benefits of smart, stress-free investing.

unique_features.title: Full Control of Your Investment

features.text: Exclusive Insight Video on EA Strategy
Exclusive Insight Video on EA Strategy

faqs.q: Why consider using a trading robot?
faqs.a: Trading robots automate the complex processes of analysis and execution in the financial markets. By following predefined criteria and algorithms, these robots can open and close trades with speed and precision that far surpass human capabilities. Operating around the clock, trading robots don't experience fatigue, emotional bias, or the need for rest, making them exceptionally reliable. Unlike humans, who may struggle with consistency and reaction time, a trading robot delivers unwavering performance.
The returns depend completely on your risk. But with default settings and a 1% risk per trade you can expect around 3-4% monthly return.

faqs.q: Do you have a Myfxbook or investor login?
faqs.a: Yes, we have a verified Myfxbook account with our full track record available. We cannot share our investor login due to risk of copy trading.

faqs.q: How do I receive my order?
faqs.a: Your order will be automatically delivered to your email. You will get access to your license and EA Download Panel. This Panel will also let you change your active account numbers for the EA.

You can use any broker but we strongly suggest using our partnered broker as we saw the best results with them. Brokers can sometimes have slightly different price feeds and also increased slippage which will affect the bot's performance.

faqs.q: Do I need a computer to get started?
faqs.a: You will need a computer (Windows/MacOS) to set it up. In addition we strongly advise using a VPS in order to have the bot running 24/7 without any issues.
You need a minimum deposit of $10,000 in your trading account besides the cost of the software.

For obvious reasons we cannot fully disclose the trading strategy but we can tell you it's based on a momentum breakout strategy. You will have quick in and out's almost daily. This will reduce stress and exposure to the market a lot.

faqs.q: Can I have a free trial?
faqs.a: Yes! We offer a 14-day FREE trial so you can test the EA completely free on your account and make an informed purchase decision.
Our EA works on both MT4 and MT5 platforms for Standard and Pro plans.
You can email us at support@elitextrade.com or use the contact form on our website. Our team typically responds within 2-4 hours.
